# Momentum by BioSked

> Healthcare workforce scheduling software for hospitals, clinics, and medical groups.

Momentum helps healthcare organizations build fair, compliant staff schedules and manage coverage, requests, RVUs, time tracking, and multi-site operations. The links below are canonical public sources; use a localized page when its language matches the request.

## Product and company

- [Product overview](https://biosked.com/): Momentum capabilities, healthcare use cases, and product tour.
- [Pricing](https://biosked.com/pricing/): Current plans and included capabilities.
- [Book a demo](https://biosked.com/demo/): Product demonstration request page.
- [About BioSked](https://biosked.com/about/): Company background, locations, and leadership.

## Localized product pages

- [France](https://biosked.com/fr/): French product overview for healthcare organizations in France.
- [French-speaking Switzerland](https://biosked.com/fr-ch/): Swiss French product overview.
- [Germany](https://biosked.com/de/): German product overview.
- [Netherlands](https://biosked.com/nl/): Dutch product overview.
- [Italy](https://biosked.com/it/): Italian product overview.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://biosked.com/blog/): Healthcare scheduling guidance and product news.
- [Customer references](https://biosked.com/fr/cas-clients/): Published customer case studies in French.
- [Product changelog](https://biosked.com/changelog/): Recent product updates.
